formulas.name: Separating Variables Formula
formulas.variables: dx: differential of x, dt: differential of time, f(x): function of x, g(y): function of y
formulas.notes: Used to separate variables in a differential equation.

formulas.name: Linear Differential Equation Formula
formulas.variables: P: coefficient, Q: function of x or constant
formulas.notes: General form of a linear differential equation.

formulas.name: Bernoulli's Equation Formula
formulas.variables: P(x): coefficient, Q(x): function of x, n: exponent

formulas.name: Euler's Method Formula
formulas.variables: x_n: current value, h: step size, f(x_n): function value at x_n
formulas.notes: Used for numerical solution of differential equations.

formulas.name: Modified Euler's Method Formula
formulas.variables: x_n: current value, h: step size, f(x_n): function value at x_n
formulas.notes: Used for more accurate numerical solution of differential equations.

formulas.name: Lagrange's Linear Equation Formula
formulas.variables: P: coefficient, Q: function of x, c: constant
formulas.notes: Used to solve linear differential equations.

formulas.name: Milne's Predictor Formula
formulas.variables: y_n: current value, h: step size, f_n: function value at x_n
formulas.notes: Used for numerical solution of differential equations.

formulas.name: Milne's Corrector Formula
formulas.variables: y_n: current value, h: step size, f_n: function value at x_n
formulas.notes: Used to correct the predicted value.
